203 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
204 # Public API: load_env  — safe, no-crash environment initialisation
205 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
206 
207 
208 def load_env(
209     env_path: str | None = None,
210 ) -> dict[str, str]:
211     """Load environment variables from available sources without crashing.
212 
213     Resolution order (last wins):
214         1. IN-MEMORY os.environ — never overwritten
215         2. ``pi_loop.config_file``  — ``~/.config/pi-loop/config.json`` (optional)
216         3. ``.env`` file in CWD  — ``.env`` (optional, no crash if missing)
217         4. Sensible defaults — final fallback for any unset known var
218 
219     Args:
220         env_path: Path to a ``.env`` file.  Defaults to ``.env`` in CWD.
221 
222     Returns:
223         A dict of all known env vars with their resolved values (as seen
224         in ``os.environ`` after loading).
225     """
226     if env_path is None:
